B1000_VSN_CD Vision Indicates patient's ability to see in adequate light with glasses or other visual appliances. 0. Adequate – sees fine detail, such as regular print in newspapers/books
1. Impaired – sees large print, but not regular print in newspapers/books
2. Moderate impaired – limited vision; not able to see newspaper headlines but can identify objects
3. Highly impaired – object identification in question, but
